title: selaginella papillosa
intro: Selaginella papillosa, also known as the hairy spike moss, is a type of spore-bearing plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella papillosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be dried and used in herbal capsules or supplements.
